Header file for display driver functions, including initialization, error display, and firmware update progress.

# Purpose
This C header file declares functions for managing a display interface, likely for an embedded system such as a watch. The function [`display_init`](<#display_init>) initializes the display, while [`display_boot_splash`](<#display_boot_splash>) shows a boot splash screen. The [`display_error_code`](<#display_error_code>) function displays an error code on the screen, taking a `uint32_t` as input. The [`display_prepare_for_reset`](<#display_prepare_for_reset>) function is intended to prevent visual artifacts during a system reset. Lastly, [`display_firmware_update_progress`](<#display_firmware_update_progress>) shows the progress of a firmware update, using a rational number to represent the progress, where the update is complete when the numerator equals the denominator.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
